nasb.text: as we night and day keep praying most earnestly that we may see your face, and may complete what is lacking in your faith?

esv.text: as we pray most earnestly night and day that we may see you face to face and supply what is lacking in your faith?

cnv.text: 我們晝夜迫切祈求，要見你們的面，並且要補滿你們信心的不足。

ccb.text: 我们昼夜恳切祷告，渴望能见到你们，弥补你们信心的不足之处。

csbs.text: 我们日夜迫切祈求，要见你们的面，并且要补全你们在信仰上的缺欠。
